"'''The Commodore'''" was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the head of the [[BloodScar]] pirate gang.

==Biography==
He resided on [[Gepparin]], and when interviewing prospective applicants, floated blindfolded in a pool, using it to dull all of his senses save hearing so that he could better tell if they were lying. He enjoyed food, and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] considered him insane. While his true name is never mentioned he is known only as "The Commodore".

He was killed during the [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']]{{'s}} [[Bombing of Gepparin|orbital bombardment]] of Gepparin.

{{Char-stub}}
